form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 5th of 8 at this track on February 2 over 1400m, 4 len behind Flugel Lulu carrying 56kg at $1.90. Second-up won by 2 len at Funabashi April 3 over 1500m defeating Reiwa Epoch carrying 56kg at $4.70. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 36-day let-up. First-up after four months raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 10 at this track on March 5 over 1400m, 5 len behind Heavenly Goal with 56kg at $9.40. Previously second-up made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track on June 17 over 1400m, neck behind Mega Million with 56kg at $2. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: At the latest run 7th of 12 at Urawa on March 19 over 2000m, 9 len behind Rebellion carrying 54kg at $7.40. form.formComment: At the latest run crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace but gave ground when 3rd of 12 at Urawa on March 20 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Marron Lupinus carrying 55kg at $20.70. The run before that 6th of 12 at Urawa on February 26 over 1400m, 9 len behind Kitasan Ribbon carrying 55kg at $58.40. Making headway. Likely to measure up again.

form.formComment: Last start raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 12 at Urawa on March 19 over 2000m, 3.5 len behind Rebellion with 56kg at $4.70. The race before that settled back and ran on when 7th of 13 at Ohi on February 18 over 1600m, 6 len behind Grandite with 56kg at $28.90. Can easily finish right over the top of these.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation fourth of 12 at Urawa October 27 over 1500m, 8 len behind Meisho Seoto with 56kg at $26. Previously first up; ran last of 11 at Urawa September 26 over 1300m, 16 len behind O Shin Rush with 56kg at $3.40. Looking to others for the winner.
